name: lte-setup
description: Provision MMI3G+ for LTE mobile data via USB Ethernet adapter — replaces defunct internal 3G modem with external LTE router
author: dspl1236
scripts: lte_setup.sh - Configure fair/DLINK mode for USB Ethernet
lte_restore.sh - Remove fair mode, restore factory PPP config
lte_status.sh - Diagnose USB Ethernet, DHCP, DNS, connectivity

hardware.adapter: D-Link DUB-E100 rev A4/B1 or Gembird NIC-U1 (ASIX AX88772)
hardware.router: TP-Link TL-MR3020 or any router on 192.168.0.1 subnet

notes: Based on DrGER2/MMI3GP-LAN-Setup. Creates DLinkReplacesPPP flag, enables DHCP client for en5 interface, installs dhcp-up script for DNS. MMI3G High does NOT have the ASIX driver — this module is for 3G+ and RNS-850 only.
